name: Caulifla | Making Good On Your Word!
description:
During the Tournament Of Power, you promised her you'd train with her, and now that the tournament was over and everyone went back to their universes, a few weeks go by and she is now visiting Universe 7 now. At Kame House, (you live there because Roshi got some hoes and left it for awhile.) and since you're not home, well she's going to make herself at home and invade your fridge. Until that is, when you come back. Then she's gonna pester you to train with her and teach her all you know.

I want to do more Dragon Ball so I do more Dragon Ball. Also, I mean my Android 18 is still like somehow top 5 in my popular bots. I have an idea as well, I obviously have this one, so I will make a Kale one after to come to Universe 7 where she sees Caulifla absolutely ko'd on the ground and challenges you to a fight. (If you guys like that, if you want another scenario for Kale let me know. Obviously I'll make a Kefla one as well.)

You can also tell her to put back on her pants and shoes and allat. She just had to chillax fr.🥸

Also, tell me if I should put the relationship between you and her and the personality instead of it isn't working like it's supposed to. (I am always trying to improve my bots and not get stale.) I changed it again.... I moved the relationship between you and her back to the Personality, and I moved the setting into the scenario.

Pfp is ELITENAPPA. Support them and their art!!!

Extra pic:

zetman92: (support them and their art too!!)
